تموتن الا وانم مسلمون ثم اما

مريض الا شافيت ولا دين الا قضيت ولا
اولادا الا اصلحت ولا حاجه من حوا دنيا رض
قيتها ويسرتها لنا اللهم كان رزقنا في

كان بعيدا فقربه وان كان قريبا فيسير كان

summary: This is a recorded Friday prayer (Jumu'ah) service from the Muslim Community Center of Tucson. The content includes the traditional khutbah (sermon) with Islamic teachings about piety (taqwa), family relations, and the rights of spouses in Islam. The speaker references Quranic verses and prophetic traditions (ahadith) to emphasize the importance of treating one's family with kindness and mercy, particularly regarding the treatment of wives. The transcript also contains the complete recitation of Quranic surahs and the formal prayer service including Surah Al-Humaza and Surah Al-Nas.
suggested_title: Friday Jumu'ah Khutbah: Family Rights and Treatment of Spouses in Islam
